name: doggypile
description: Single-binary daemon and browser PWA for chatting with local coding agents from your phone over iroh.

scripts.stop: cd daemon && cargo run -q -p doggypile --bin doggypile -- stop
scripts.daemon: cd daemon && cargo run -p doggypile --bin doggypile -- serve
scripts.pair: cd daemon && cargo run -q -p doggypile --bin doggypile -- pair
scripts.web: cd daemon && cargo run -q -p doggypile --bin doggypile -- web
scripts.build:daemon: cd daemon && cargo build --release -p doggypile --bin doggypile
